quoteLast: in the morning both vessels left the Nore, and at 30-1/2 minutes past 2 the Rattler stopped her engines in Yarmouth Roads, where in 20-1/2 minutes afterward she was joined by the Alecto.
title: A Catechism of the Steam Engine
author: Bourne, John, C. E.

quoteLast: this morning Bettesworth was lacing up his boots.
